cases.prompt: Map the monorepo, then split a checkout change across four agents with non-overlapping writes.
cases.anti_route: The coordinator must not invent boundaries that repository-intelligence has not evidenced.

cases.prompt: We already have a repository impact report. Assign agents, waves, single-owner lockfile work, and integration order.
cases.primary_decision: The map exists; delegation is now the owned decision.
cases.anti_route: Do not rerun a broad repository audit unless assumptions are stale or incomplete.

cases.prompt: An Expo SDK upgrade caused an unexplained crash. Find the cause and then plan the supported migration.
cases.primary_decision: Unknown cause first; version transition second; platform implementation third; integrated gate last.
cases.anti_route: Do not downgrade or upgrade blindly as a debugging experiment.

cases.prompt: Upgrade Next.js, update the changed API docs, and decide whether the integrated release can ship.
cases.primary_decision: Evolution owns transition; docs owns drift; release owns final evidence.
cases.anti_route: The web builder may supply feature checks but cannot self-approve the integrated release.

cases.prompt: Define a new visual direction, reconstruct one approved reference screen, and implement a production web flow.
cases.primary_decision: Direction, reconstruction, and production implementation are distinct handoffs.
cases.anti_route: Do not use a screenshot to replace unresolved product direction.

cases.prompt: The screenshot matches, but keyboard focus, error recovery, caching, and telemetry are missing.
cases.primary_decision: Reference fidelity is complete; production concerns remain.
cases.anti_route: Do not reopen visual reconstruction unless a fidelity defect is observed.

cases.prompt: Choose Flutter or Expo for the app, then implement the selected stack.
cases.anti_route: A platform builder must not silently choose the platform from familiarity.

cases.prompt: Flutter is fixed by contract. Upgrade its routing package and update migration docs.
cases.primary_decision: Evolution controls version transition; Flutter builder supplies platform checks; docs synchronizes behavior.
cases.anti_route: Do not invoke mobile-architecture-director because the platform choice is not open.

cases.prompt: A flaky release test fails in CI. Determine why, then reassess release readiness.
cases.primary_decision: Diagnose evidence integrity before the gate.
cases.anti_route: A rerun-to-green result is not sufficient release evidence.

cases.prompt: Map docs affected by an API schema migration and include them in the migration sequence.
cases.primary_decision: Repository map finds consumers/surfaces; evolution sequences the contract; docs repairs communication.
cases.anti_route: Documentation does not decide the API compatibility model.

cases.prompt: Two agents both need package.json and the generated lockfile during a web feature.
cases.primary_decision: Coordinator makes shared manifests/lockfiles single-owner; builder implements within ownership.
cases.anti_route: Do not allow both writers and rely on merge conflict resolution.

cases.prompt: Redesign this page based on existing product evidence, with no supplied visual reference.
cases.primary_decision: Audit and direction are primary without a reference image.
cases.anti_route: Do not trigger screenshot-to-interface on the word redesign alone.

cases.prompt: Use this screenshot only as a layout reference; the brand system is already approved.
cases.anti_route: Do not invent a new brand direction.

cases.prompt: Implement auth in Expo and verify its final store release.
cases.primary_decision: Builder owns auth implementation/device checks; release skill owns integrated gate and rollout evidence.
cases.anti_route: Passing unit tests alone must not produce READY.

cases.prompt: Investigate stale ownership data in the repository map.
cases.primary_decision: If a mapping tool/process is malfunctioning, diagnose it; then regenerate the architecture evidence.
cases.anti_route: Do not treat an untrusted map as current evidence.

cases.prompt: Plan a native iOS/Android architecture after Flutter and Expo are disqualified by prototype evidence.
cases.primary_decision: The director records the native decision and boundaries; no Flutter/Expo builder activates.
cases.anti_route: Do not force one of the two named cross-platform builders.

cases.prompt: A dependency advisory affects the web app. Determine blast radius, execute the upgrade, and gate release.
cases.primary_decision: Impact evidence, controlled transition, platform-level checks, then release gate.
cases.anti_route: Do not convert the advisory into an unsourced package replacement.

cases.prompt: Update screenshots in the help center after the approved UI implementation.
cases.primary_decision: The UI behavior/direction is settled; this is documentation drift.
cases.anti_route: Do not invoke screenshot-to-interface merely because screenshots are inputs.
